summary: Tested Operational Chain & Documents section for Ocean2joy. All View/Download/Upload buttons work correctly. UI logic is correct but project data is missing critical dates (files_accessed_at, work_accepted_at) which causes Work Accepted section to show 'No documents yet'.

minor.issue: Project ead900d9-33ab-4b22-9e72-20fbc1820bcc is missing files_accessed_at and work_accepted_at dates despite being marked as completed

action_items: Set files_accessed_at date for project ead900d9-33ab-4b22-9e72-20fbc1820bcc (should be before work_accepted_at)
Set work_accepted_at date for project ead900d9-33ab-4b22-9e72-20fbc1820bcc (should be after files_accessed_at)
Set payment_confirmed_by_admin_at timestamp (currently only boolean flag is set)
critical_code_review_comments: OperationalChainWithDocuments.js logic is correct - Work Accepted shows documents only when files_accessed_at is set
Button disabled states work correctly with proper tooltip messages
View modals display correct document content for all document types
Upload modals open correctly for Payment Proof and Signed Invoice

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI functionality works, data issue causes Work Accepted to show 'No documents yet'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Operational Chain UI is working correctly. Main agent needs to populate files_accessed_at and work_accepted_at dates in the Marcos project to complete the OS.1 v2.0 cycle testing.

operational_chain_display.details: All 11 steps display correctly with proper dates and status badges

view_buttons.details: All View buttons open modals with correct document content (Quote Request, Invoice, Delivered, Files Accessed, Payment Proof, Receipt, Certificate)

download_buttons.details: Download buttons work - show alert 'will be implemented with actual file storage' as expected

upload_buttons.details: Upload buttons open correct modals (Upload Signed Invoice, Upload Payment Proof) with file input

disabled_button_states.details: Disabled buttons show proper tooltip messages (e.g., 'Upload not available: System document', 'Download not available: Not accessed yet')

confirm_access_button.details: Confirm Access button visible in Files Accessed section when files_accessed_at is null

work_accepted_section.details: Shows 'No documents yet' because files_accessed_at is null - UI logic is correct, data needs to be populated

files_accessed_section.details: Shows 'pending_access' status because files_accessed_at is null - UI logic is correct, data needs to be populated

payment_sent_section.details: View/Download/Upload buttons all work correctly, shows Payment Proof with Pending status

mocked_functionality.download: handleDownload shows alert instead of actual file download - EXPECTED
